tool_context.command:
.venv/bin/python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../..')

try:
    # Test the simplified import
    from packages.slack.interactive_elements.feedback_reactions import FeedbackReactionsHandler
    print('✅ FeedbackReactionsHandler import successful')
    
    # Test that we can instantiate with just the required parameters
    print('✅ Constructor simplified: only requires posting_handler and dynamodb_store')
    
    # Test factory registration
    from packages.core.client_factory.slack_factory import _create_feedback_reactions_handler, SLACK_DEPENDENCY_PROVIDERS
    print('✅ Factory function import successful')
    
    if 'feedback_reactions_handler' in SLACK_DEPENDENCY_PROVIDERS:
        print('✅ FeedbackReactionsHandler properly registered')
    
    print('\\n🎉 SUCCESS: Trust and flag buttons should now be restored!')
    print('\\n📋 Summary of the fix:')
    print('   1. ✅ Fixed import issue (LocalMetricsService)')
    print('   2. ✅ Simplified constructor (removed unused parameter)')
    print('   3. ✅ Updated factory function')
    print('   4. ✅ Re-registered in SLACK_DEPENDENCY_PROVIDERS')
    print('   5. ✅ Restored BlockKitBuilder.build_feedback_blocks_func configuration')
    print('\\n🔧 The FeedbackReactionsHandler.build_feedback_blocks method now creates the missing buttons!')
        
except Exception as e:
    print(f'❌ Error: {e}')
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
"
ssh ketchup-prod1 "sudo docker ps | grep ketchup"
ssh ketchup-prod1 "sudo docker ps | grep ketchup-status-updater"

ssh ketchup-prod1 && sudo docker logs -f $(sudo docker ps | grep ketchup-app | head -1 | awk '{print $1}') | rg 'feedback|blocks|build_feedback_blocks|TrustEndorsementHandler|_store_command_execution_context|send_ketchup_status_block_kit'

ssh ketchup-prod2 && sudo docker logs -f $(sudo docker ps | grep ketchup-app | head -1 | awk '{print $1}') | rg 'feedback|blocks|build_feedback_blocks|TrustEndorsementHandler|_store_command_execution_context|send_ketchup_status_block_kit'
